output.context: Re-QA after padding revision. Container changed from py-10 md:py-24 to py-16 md:py-24. Section remains py-10 sm:py-16. Matches TestimonialsCarousel pattern.

observations: Overall shape and proportions match Figma: dark charcoal rounded panel containing heading area, progress bar, navigation, and cards
Major elements are in the correct positions: eyebrow above heading, description and button on right column, progress bar and nav arrows below heading area, three-column card grid below
Relative sizes are correct: generous internal padding inside charcoal panel, moderate gap between adjacent charcoal panels
Visual weight and density match: the charcoal panel dominates the section with appropriate breathing room from content to edges
No content overflow or clipping observed at any breakpoint

paddingVerification.primaryFocus: Verify 96px padding inside charcoal panel at desktop, no visible double-padding between section and container

desktop1440.sectionPadding: py-10 sm:py-16 (64px at desktop) -- transparent, creates gap between charcoal panels
desktop1440.containerPadding: py-16 md:py-24 (96px at desktop) -- inside charcoal background area
desktop1440.charcoalInternalPaddingTop: Visually ~96px from top of charcoal panel to eyebrow text -- matches Figma's --margin/margin-7 (96px)
desktop1440.charcoalInternalPaddingBottom: Visually ~96px from bottom of card area to bottom of charcoal panel -- matches Figma
desktop1440.interSectionGap: 64px transparent gap between charcoal panels (from section py-16) -- appropriate spacing, no double-padding effect
desktop1440.verdict: PASS -- 96px padding appears INSIDE the charcoal background as intended

mobile375.sectionPadding: py-10 (40px at base) -- transparent, creates gap between charcoal panels
mobile375.containerPadding: py-16 (64px at mobile, md:py-24 not active below 768px) -- inside charcoal background area
mobile375.charcoalInternalPadding: Visually ~64px at mobile -- proportionally appropriate for the narrower viewport
mobile375.interSectionGap: 40px transparent gap between charcoal panels -- appropriate for mobile
mobile375.verdict: PASS -- proportional padding at mobile, no double-padding

structuralMatch.containerClasses: Both: container relative py-16 md:py-24 before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-(--side-gutter) md:before:-inset-8
structuralMatch.verdict: EXACT MATCH -- both blocks use identical section and container class strings

visualMatch.charcoalPanelProportions: Identical proportions between DynamicContentCarousel and TestimonialsCarousel
visualMatch.interSectionSpacing: Same gap pattern between adjacent charcoal panels
visualMatch.internalPadding: Same visual padding depth from charcoal edges to content
visualMatch.verdict: PASS -- visually consistent between both blocks

spacing.notes: Container internal padding (96px desktop, 64px mobile) matches Figma. Section outer padding (64px desktop, 40px mobile) provides appropriate transparent gaps.

layout.notes: Three-column card grid at desktop, single-column at mobile. Content stays within charcoal boundary.

colors.notes: Dark charcoal background panel with rounded corners matches Figma. White text on dark background. Accent-colored cards.

borderRadius.notes: Charcoal panel has rounded-3xl corners, matching Figma's rounded panel design.

pseudoElementCoverage.notes: before:-inset-(--side-gutter) at mobile extends to near viewport edges. md:before:-inset-8 (32px) at desktop extends 32px beyond container on all sides. Charcoal background fully covers all content with no gaps visible.
